title: SettlementEvent
description: Represents a single disbursement line item from Affirm to the merchant, associated with a specific transaction event.

id.description: A unique identifier for the settlement event.

transaction_id.description: The identifier of the transaction this settlement event belongs to.

transaction_event_id.description: The identifier of the specific transaction event that triggered this settlement.

amount.description: Net disbursement amount in the smallest currency unit.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for this settlement.

created.description: Timestamp when this settlement event was created, in RFC 3339 format.

type.description: The type of settlement event corresponding to the transaction action.
